title: The Opening
story_beat: Pink Bear wakes up on Easter morning, full of hopeful anticipation, only to discover a snowy surprise that hints at the challenge ahead.

techniques.name: character_voice
techniques.reason: Learner has not been assessed on this skill, and it's crucial for establishing Pink Bear's personality from the start.

techniques.name: show_dont_tell
techniques.reason: Learner is developing in this skill, and the opening is a perfect place to practice showing Pink Bear's personality and the unexpected weather.

techniques.name: sensory_detail
techniques.reason: Learner is competent, so a brief reminder will suffice to ensure they apply it to the setting.

wonder_prompt: Imagine meeting someone for the first time. What little things do they say or do that immediately tell you who they are, without them ever saying 'I am kind' or 'I am brave'?
wonder_example: Corduroy was a bear who once lived in a big department store. Day after day he waited with all the other toys for someone to come and take him home. The only trouble was, he was missing a button. (Don Freeman, Corduroy)
build_instructions: As you write, focus on introducing Pink Bear's optimistic personality and the unexpected snowy Easter morning, letting her actions and observations reveal the world and the first hint of the story's challenge.
page_prompts: Write the moment Pink Bear wakes up on Easter morning, filled with excitement for the day. What does she see, hear, and feel in Susie's cozy bedroom?
Pink Bear peeks out the window, expecting a sunny spring garden, but instead sees a blanket of white. Describe her immediate reaction and what she notices about the unexpected snow.
Pink Bear realizes the snow means her perfect Easter plans might be ruined. Write the moment she decides she won't let a little snow stop her, showing her optimistic spirit.
reflect_preview: Pink Bear is determined to make Easter perfect, snow or no snow! But with the garden buried, how will she find those hidden eggs, and what new 'perfect' will she imagine for tomorrow?
